description: Postgraduate course hero banner displaying the course title, award type, department, key details (start date, duration, attendance), feature badges, action buttons, and a sticky CTA bar.

props.name: stickyButtons
props.type: Array<{ label: string; href: string; iconClass: string }>

stories.name: Default
stories.description: Standard PG course header with full-time attendance and course fee feature

props.department: School of Biosciences, Faculty of Science
props.courseIntro: Satisfy your curiosity and understand people and populations of the past through the study of human skeletal remains. Learn the scientific techniques you'll need to collect, analyse and present anthropological data as you contribute to the ever-evolving field of bioarchaeology.

stories.name: Accredited
stories.description: PG course header with accreditation feature badge shown

props.department: School of Medicine and Population Health, Faculty of Health
props.courseIntro: Develop essential research and analytical skills for evaluating health services and public health interventions, laying a solid foundation for a PhD or an academic career in public health.

stories.name: PartTimeOnline
stories.description: PG course with part-time and online learning attendance modes

props.department: School of Education, Faculty of Social Sciences
props.courseIntro: Enhance your professional performance by developing a deeper understanding of planning, teaching and assessment strategies, new technologies and links between practice, theory and research.

notes: Structurally similar to UgKeyBg but for postgraduate courses. Key differences: root class is 'pgkeybg', title box uses 'pg-title-box', H1 uses class 'pgtitle', department uses class 'deptfac fb', intro uses 'pg-course-introd'. Details list shows start date, duration (pgduration spans), and attendance (pgattendance spans) — multiple values for duration and attendance are possible. Features list uses Font Awesome icons with anchor links to page sections. Sticky CTA bar always has 'on-load' class. The shrinkctas div contains the text 'Hide'. This component is always found within '#main'.
